title: Grievance Redressal Policy
subtitle: We're Here to Help Resolve Your Concerns
introduction: QuikkRed is committed to providing excellent customer service and resolving customer grievances in a timely and efficient manner. This Grievance Redressal Policy outlines the process for customers to escalate their concerns and the timelines within which they can expect resolution.

level1.title: Level 1: Customer Service/Helpdesk
level1.description: For any queries, complaints, or feedback, customers can reach out to our Customer Service team through the following channels:
level1.timings: Monday to Saturday (10 AM to 6 PM)
level1.resolution: We strive to resolve all queries within 7 working days from the date of receipt.

level2.title: Level 2: Customer Relationship Manager (CRM)
level2.description: If your complaint is not resolved at Level 1 within 7 working days, or if you are unsatisfied with the resolution provided, you may escalate the matter to our Customer Relationship Manager:
level2.timings: Monday to Friday (11 AM to 5 PM)
level2.resolution: The CRM will review your complaint and provide a resolution within 10 working days from the date of escalation.

level3.title: Level 3: Grievance Redressal Officer (GRO) / Nodal Officer
level3.description: If your complaint remains unresolved at Level 2, or if you are not satisfied with the resolution, you may further escalate your concern to our Grievance Redressal Officer (GRO):
level3.address: QuikkRed, 1008, 10th Floor, Vikrant Tower, Rajendra Place, New Delhi - 110005
level3.resolution: The GRO will review your complaint and provide a final resolution within 15 working days from the date of escalation.

rbiOmbudsman.title: Escalation to RBI Ombudsman
rbiOmbudsman.description: If your complaint is not resolved satisfactorily within 30 days of approaching the company, you may approach the RBI Ombudsman under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
items: Provide a resolution within the timelines specified above
Keep customers informed about the status of their complaint
Treat all complaints with fairness, respect, and confidentiality
